evals.prompt: Review this PowerShell module (.psm1 and .psd1) for module architecture issues. Check the export conventions, manifest consistency, and function organization.
evals.expected_output: Should flag: (1) Get-ArenaMsiPath is exported for Pester mocking but has no dedicated section marker, (2) FunctionsToExport in the manifest is not alphabetically sorted
expectations: Flags that Get-ArenaMsiPath appears to be exported for testing/mocking but lacks a dedicated section marker like '# Exported for testing'
Flags that FunctionsToExport in the .psd1 is not alphabetically sorted (Test, Install, Get should be Get, Install, Test)

evals.prompt: Review these two PowerShell modules for cross-module architecture issues. Check for code duplication and shared utility patterns.
evals.expected_output: Should flag: Get-SafePath is duplicated across both modules and should be extracted to a shared/common module
expectations: Flags that Get-SafePath is duplicated identically across ATS.Installation and ATS.Configuration modules
Recommends extracting the shared utility to a common module
